title: helianthus tubiflorus
intro: Helianthus tubiflorus, also known as the common sunflower or narrow-leaved sunflower, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. Its tubular flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Helianthus tubiflorus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
